---
title: "Case Study — Agentic Ops Reduces Cost by 26%"
date: 2025-09-16T19:32:00.000Z
summary: "How policy-aware routing and eval gates lowered spend without sacrificing quality."
---

A platform team implemented budget-aware model routing and online eval gates.

Results over 6 weeks:

- 26% reduction in model spend at equal or higher quality
- 18% latency improvement via graceful downgrades during spikes
- Zero severity-1 incidents during rollout due to guarded autonomy

The key was aligning routing policy to business SLOs and evidence, not token counts.
